name: Ben Potter
html:
CODER
Ben Potter
Works at Coder
css: .bpmct-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #0d0d0d; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; padding: 8% 6%; box-sizing: border-box; gap: 6%; } .bpmct-logo { font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 5vw, 2.2rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #fff; text-transform: uppercase; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F54242, #F54242 40%, #fff 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; animation: bpmct-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } .bpmct-name { font-size: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 1.8rem); font-weight: 700; color: #fff; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .bpmct-title { font-size: clamp(0.6rem, 2.5vw, 1rem); color: #aaa; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } @keyframes bpmct-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.7; } }
